typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured (no mypy/pyright in project)"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: when inserting facts via MCP tools (memory_add_fact, memory_feedback correction), set BOTH `timestamp` and `last_validated` to the current UTC time. `timestamp` marks when the fact was created; `last_validated` marks it as freshly validated for confidence decay purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory_add_fact sets last_validated=now but not timestamp, while memory_feedback correction sets timestamp=now but not last_validated. Both should set both fields for consistency.
